title: Decadent Smoky Canadian Vegan Trout Poutine
description: A festive twist on a classic Canadian comfort dish featuring smoky carrot-based vegan trout and a dramatic brandy flambe finish.

ingredients.name: Carrot lox
ingredients.notes: marinated in liquid smoke and sea salt

instructions: Bake the thick-cut fries at 220 degrees Celsius until they are golden and very crunchy.
Place the hot fries into a large heat-proof serving bowl or cast iron skillet.
Layer the vegan cheese curds evenly over the hot fries so they begin to soften.
Tear the smoky carrot lox into bite-sized pieces and distribute them over the cheese.
Pour the boiling hot vegan brown gravy over the entire dish to melt the curds.
Warm the brandy in a small long-handled saucepan over low heat until wisps of vapor appear.
Carefully ignite the brandy with a long reach lighter and pour the flaming liquid over the poutine.
Wait for the flames to subside naturally before touching the dish.
Garnish the poutine with fresh dill, capers, and lemon zest for brightness.
Serve immediately while the gravy is bubbling and the smoky aroma is at its peak.
